g.text: Preparation of a design for clinical performance trials for MDs/IVDs, except for non
sterile IVDs, according to the requirements of Regulation 22017/745 and 2017/746.
Preparation of documentation for obtaining permission from the BDA to conduct clinical
trials for each individual Md or IVD, except for non
Management of clinical trials for each individual MD or IVD, including
contact with laboratories conducting the studies, preparation of
documentation for each patient, data collection and analysis.
Preparation of a Clinical Performance Trial Report, a mandatory
documentation for conformity assessment of the MD/IVD.
